slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width with COMPACT white text 'BURN EMERGENCY GUIDE'. Top-right below stripe: 소아과언니 white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '화상 입었을 때' white bold, '첫 1분이 중요합니다' bright red #E63946. Small white subtitle: '즉시 행동으로 손상을 최소화 · AAP 가이드라인 기준'. LARGE prominent line illustration of child with burn injury and parent doing first aid, white outline on dark background, prominent placement center-right. Bottom-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · 010'. No pixel values. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left red rounded label: '즉시 행동 ✓'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '열원으로부터' white bold, '아이를 떼어내세요' mint #2EC4B6. Center-upper: MEDIUM line illustration of parent removing child from hot surface, white outline with mint accents. Below illustration: mint outlined box with GENEROUS padding containing two rows. First row: SMALL ICON left (water drop with mint ✓ overlay) plus COMPACT white text right '뜨거운 물·물체로부터 즉시 이동'. Second row: SMALL ICON left (clothing with mint ✓ overlay) plus COMPACT white text right '옷에 불이 붙었다면 불을 끄고 단단히 붙지 않은 옷은 제거'. GENEROUS spacing between rows. Bottom thin mint divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left mint rounded label: '찬물로 식히기 ✓'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '흐르는 찬물로' white bold, '5분간 식혀주세요' mint #2EC4B6. Center: LARGE line illustration of running cool water over burned hand under faucet, white and mint outline. Below: mint outlined box GENEROUS padding. Inside: SMALL water icon left (mint ✓) plus COMPACT white text right '찬물로 약 5분간 흐르게 해서 식히기'. Second row: SMALL thermometer down icon left (mint ✓) plus COMPACT white text right '화상 진행을 멈추고 통증·부종 감소'. GENEROUS spacing. Bottom thin mint divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left red rounded label: '절대 하지 마세요 ❌'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '얼음을' white bold, '직접 대지 마세요' bright red #E63946. Center-upper: MEDIUM line illustration of ice cube with big red X overlay, white outline. Below: red outlined box GENEROUS padding containing two rows. First row: SMALL ICON left (ice cube with red ❌ overlay) plus COMPACT white text right '얼음을 화상 부위에 직접 대면 안 됨'. Second row: SMALL ICON left (blood vessel constriction icon with red ❌) plus COMPACT white text right '혈관수축·저체온증 위험 증가해 화상 악화'. GENEROUS spacing between rows. Bottom thin red divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left red rounded label: '절대 금지 ❌'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '화상 부위를' white bold, '만지지 마세요' bright red #E63946. Center-upper: MEDIUM line illustration of hand touching blister with red X overlay, white outline. Below: red outlined box GENEROUS padding. First row: SMALL hand rubbing icon left (red ❌ overlay) plus COMPACT white text right '화상 부위 문지르지 말기 · 손상 악화'. Second row: SMALL blister icon left (red ❌ overlay) plus COMPACT white text right '물집 터뜨리지 말기 · 감염 위험 증가'. GENEROUS spacing between rows. Bottom thin red divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left red rounded label: '민간요법 금지 ❌'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '아무것도' white bold, '바르지 마세요' bright red #E63946. Center-upper: MEDIUM line illustration of butter, oil, soybean paste, toothpaste with big red X, white outline. Below: red outlined box GENEROUS padding. First row: SMALL folk remedy icon left (red ❌ overlay) plus COMPACT white text right '버터·기름·된장·간장·치약 등 민간요법 금지'. Second row: SMALL ointment tube icon left (red ❌ overlay) plus COMPACT white text right '소아청소년과 의사 지시 없이 연고·약 바르지 말기'. GENEROUS spacing. Bottom thin red divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left mint rounded label: '보호하기 ✓'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '깨끗한 붕대로' white bold, '덮어주세요' mint #2EC4B6. Center: LARGE line illustration of clean bandage wrapping around arm burn gently, white and mint outline. Below: mint outlined box GENEROUS padding. Inside: SMALL bandage icon left (mint ✓) plus COMPACT white text right '화상 부위를 깨끗한 붕대로 덮기'. Second row: SMALL shield icon left (mint ✓) plus COMPACT white text right '감염 위험 낮추고 통증 감소'. GENEROUS spacing. Bottom thin mint divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Full-width bright red #E63946 header bar with white bold '즉시 병원으로 가야 할 때'. Center: LARGE line illustration of ambulance with emergency light, white and red outline prominent. Below: numbered items in large red rounded border GENEROUS padding. Number 1 in red circle plus white text '물집이 생기고 아이 손바닥보다 큰 화상'. Number 2 in red circle plus white text '손·발·얼굴·생식기·관절 부위 화상'. Number 3 in red circle plus white text '전기 화상이나 피부가 까맣게 탄 경우'. GENEROUS spacing between items. Bottom thin red divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. VERY GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'. Headline COMPACT: '오늘 확인하고' white bold with '저장하세요' mint #2EC4B6 underline. Source box dark #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding. 출처 white small bold. Bullet 'First Aid Guide for Parents & Caregivers - Burns, AAP 2017'. Bullet 'First Aid for Burns: Parent FAQs, AAP 2023'. Bullet 'Cool Running Water as a First Aid Treatment for Burn Injuries, Annals of Emergency Medicine 2025'. Thin white divider. 소아과언니 white bold large center NO quotes. DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray small. Thin white divider. '@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드' white. '소아과수첩 앱 · 야간 달빛병원 바로 찾기' mint. No pixel values. No quotes anywhere.

common_style:
# 경고·긴급 톤 — 검증된 prompt 패턴

## 공통 규칙 (전 슬라이드)
- 배경: 짙은 네이비 #0D1B2A
- 텍스트: 흰색 #FFFFFF
- 긴급 강조: bright red #E63946
- 안전/긍정: mint #2EC4B6
- 카드 배경: #1A2B3C
- GENEROUS outer margin 모든 슬라이드
- 텍스트 크기 25% 작게
- 슬라이드마다 아이콘/일러스트 필수
- 시그니쳐: 우상단 소아과언니 white (따옴표 없이 4글자만)

## COVER 패턴 (slide n:1)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A.
GENEROUS outer margin all sides.
Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width + COMPACT white text '[토픽] 긴급 가이드'.
Top-right below stripe: '소아과언니' white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes.
Headline COMPACT (25% smaller): '[첫 줄]' white bold, '[핵심 긴급 표현]' bright red #E63946.
Small white subtitle: '[부제] · AAP 가이드라인 기준'.
LARGE prominent line illustration [토픽 관련 응급 장면] white outline on dark background.
Bottom-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · [번호]'.
No pixel values. No quotes.

## 금지 항목 패턴 (❌ 슬라이드)
Dark navy background.
Top-left red rounded label: '절대 하지 마세요 ❌'.
Headline COMPACT: '[내용]' white, '[핵심]' red.
Rows stacked: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION ICON left (red ❌ overlay) + COMPACT white text right.
Red outlined box around all rows, comfortable padding.
No pixel values.

## 행동 항목 패턴 (✓ 슬라이드)
Dark navy background.
Top-left mint rounded label: '[행동] ✓'.
Headline COMPACT: '[내용]' white, '[핵심]' mint #2EC4B6.
Rows stacked: SMALL ICON left (mint ✓ overlay) + COMPACT white text right, GENEROUS spacing.
Mint outlined box around all rows.
No pixel values.

## 119 패턴
Full-width bright red header bar + white bold '[긴급 행동]'.
LARGE relevant illustration center (구급차/응급 아이콘).
Numbered items: red number + white text, GENEROUS spacing.
Large red rounded border around items.

## OUTRO 패턴 (slide n:9)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy #0D1B2A.
VERY GENEROUS outer margin.
Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes.
Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'.
Headline COMPACT: '오늘 확인하고 저장하세요' white, '저장하세요' mint underline.
Source box dark #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding.
출처 (white small bold)
· [출처 1]
· [출처 2]
Thin white divider.
소아과언니 white bold large center (NO quotes).
DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray.
Thin divider.
@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 white.
소아과수첩 앱 · [CTA] mint.
No pixel values. No quotes.
